scene_1.visual_plan: Begin with a medium close-up of the model seated in a softly lit bathroom setting, natural light coming from a nearby window to accentuate her hair texture. The camera is on a tripod with a slow, subtle zoom in as she speaks to maintain engagement. The depth of field is shallow, focusing crisply on the model’s face while softly blurring the background. The model looks directly at the camera throughout to create an honest, intimate connection. Midway through the scene, the model picks up the KYOGOKU Color Shampoo bottle with her right hand, bringing it into frame near her face for clear product visibility, holding it naturally as if sharing a personal recommendation. The camera briefly cuts to a close-up of the product’s label before returning to the medium close-up for the conclusion.
scene_1.dialogue: I wish I knew this before trying to cover my gray hair with messy dyes. I struggled for years until I found KYOGOKU Color Shampoo, which not only covers gray hair naturally while I shampoo but also nourishes my hair with natural ingredients like apple stem cells and hyaluronic acid. Now my hair feels healthier, shinier, and the floral scent makes every wash feel like a spa treatment.
